SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: PRE_ICL_INP_COPAY_OS 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS Files) 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: This variable was only populated from 2007–2012. Plans that use a coinsurance percentage amount 
rather than a co-payment will not have a value in this field; see instead the corresponding coinsurance 
variable called (PRE_ICL_INP_COINS_OS).
